mappings.notes: Sequential write-blocking intent translated to combinational: when lock=1, any access request produces error output
Sequential persistence intent translated to combinational: locked entries always produce error for any access
Sequential stability intent translated to combinational: locked config always blocks access
Sequential TOR locking intent translated to combinational: locked TOR entries block access
Sequential write-validity intent translated to combinational: unlocked NAPOT entries allow access
Sequential TOR write-validity intent translated to combinational: locked TOR entries block access
Combinational prioritization: lowest matching region determines access grant/deny

mappings.ns31a_signal: M-mode access without PMP match succeeds
mappings.notes: Combinational: M-mode (non-debug) access without error means no PMP match

mappings.ns31a_signal: S/U-mode access without PMP match fails
mappings.notes: Combinational: S/U-mode access with any implemented PMP must produce error if no match
Combinational: error output asserted when access type should be blocked by PMP
